briefdescription.para: Initialize AXI4-Stream Remap driver with configuration.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the AXI4-Stream Remap driver instance with the provided configuration structure and effective base address. It copies the configuration, sets the base address, and marks the driver as ready.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the driver instance structure to initialize
Pointer to the configuration structure
Effective base address for the device registers

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization completed successfully
This function is only available in bare-metal builds (not Linux)

briefdescription.para: Start the AXI4-Stream Remap core operation.

detaileddescription.para: This function starts the AXI4-Stream Remap core by setting the AP_START bit in the control register while preserving the auto-restart setting.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

briefdescription.para: Check if the core operation is done.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_DONE bit in the control register to determine if the current operation has completed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: 1 if operation is done, 0 otherwise
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

briefdescription.para: Check if the core is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_IDLE bit in the control register to determine if the core is currently idle and not processing data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: 1 if core is idle, 0 if core is busy
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

briefdescription.para: Check if the core is ready for new input.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks if the core is ready to accept new input by verifying that the AP_START bit is not set.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: 1 if core is ready for new input, 0 if core is busy
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

briefdescription.para: Enable automatic restart of the core.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the auto-restart feature which causes the core to automatically restart processing after completing an operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

briefdescription.para: Disable automatic restart of the core.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the auto-restart feature, requiring manual restart via XV_axi4s_remap_Start() after each operation completes.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function configures the height (number of rows) of the video frame to be processed by the AXI4-Stream Remap core.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance
Frame height in pixels

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

briefdescription.para: Get the configured video frame height.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the currently configured height (number of rows) of the video frame from the AXI4-Stream Remap core.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: Configured frame height in pixels
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function configures the width (number of columns) of the video frame to be processed by the AXI4-Stream Remap core.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance
Frame width in pixels

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

briefdescription.para: Get the configured video frame width.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the currently configured width (number of columns) of the video frame from the AXI4-Stream Remap core.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: Configured frame width in pixels
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function configures the color format to be used for video stream processing by the AXI4-Stream Remap core.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance
Color format value

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the currently configured color format from the AXI4-Stream Remap core.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: Configured color format value
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

briefdescription.para: Set the input pixels per clock.

detaileddescription.para: This function configures the number of pixels per clock cycle for the input video stream.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance
Number of input pixels per clock (1, 2, or 4)

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

briefdescription.para: Get the configured input pixels per clock.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the currently configured number of pixels per clock cycle for the input video stream.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: Configured number of input pixels per clock
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

briefdescription.para: Set the output pixels per clock.

detaileddescription.para: This function configures the number of pixels per clock cycle for the output video stream.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance
Number of output pixels per clock (1, 2, or 4)

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

briefdescription.para: Get the configured output pixels per clock.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the currently configured number of pixels per clock cycle for the output video stream.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: Configured number of output pixels per clock
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function enables or disables HDMI 4:2:0 format processing for the input video stream.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance
1 to enable HDMI 4:2:0 mode, 0 to disable

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function reads whether HDMI 4:2:0 format processing is enabled for the input video stream.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: 1 if HDMI 4:2:0 mode is enabled, 0 if disabled
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function enables or disables HDMI 4:2:0 format processing for the output video stream.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance
1 to enable HDMI 4:2:0 mode, 0 to disable

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function reads whether HDMI 4:2:0 format processing is enabled for the output video stream.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: 1 if HDMI 4:2:0 mode is enabled, 0 if disabled
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function enables or disables pixel dropping on the input video stream to adjust the effective pixel rate.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance
1 to enable pixel drop, 0 to disable

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function reads whether pixel dropping is enabled on the input video stream.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: 1 if pixel drop is enabled, 0 if disabled
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function enables or disables pixel repetition on the output video stream to adjust the effective pixel rate.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance
1 to enable pixel repeat, 0 to disable

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function reads whether pixel repetition is enabled on the output video stream.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: 1 if pixel repeat is enabled, 0 if disabled
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the global interrupt output from the AXI4-Stream Remap core by setting the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) bit.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)
Individual interrupts must also be enabled via InterruptEnable()

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the global interrupt output from the AXI4-Stream Remap core by clearing the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) bit.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function enables individual interrupt sources by setting the corresponding bits in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance
Bitmask of interrupts to enable (bit 0: ap_done, bit 1: ap_ready)

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)
Global interrupts must also be enabled via InterruptGlobalEnable()

detaileddescription.para: This function disables individual interrupt sources by clearing the corresponding bits in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance
Bitmask of interrupts to disable (bit 0: ap_done, bit 1: ap_ready)

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function clears pending interrupt status bits by writing to the Interrupt Status Register (ISR). This is a toggle-on-write register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance
Bitmask of interrupt flags to clear

simplesect.para: None
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)
Writing 1 to a bit toggles/clears that interrupt status

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) to determine which interrupt sources are currently enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: Bitmask of enabled interrupts (bit 0: ap_done, bit 1: ap_ready)
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) to determine which interrupt conditions are currently pending.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the initialized driver instance

simplesect.para: Bitmask of pending interrupt flags (bit 0: ap_done, bit 1: ap_ready)
The driver instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)
Use InterruptClear() to clear pending interrupt flags
